importFromUrlDesc: Paste a recipe link to scrape ingredients and steps
importFromPhotoDesc: Snap or upload a cookbook page to extract the recipe
choosePhotoDesc: Upload a photo or take a picture
photoFormatHint: JPG or PNG. We'll extract text and try to split ingredients and steps.
readingImage: Reading image… this may take a few seconds.
noSavedRecipes: No saved recipes yet. Import a recipe and choose "Save recipe" to keep it here.
noRecentRecipes: Recipes you view will appear here.
logInToSync: Log in to sync your recipes across devices
authError: Could not sign in. Try again.
introTagline: Your kitchen shouldn't be full of browser tabs
introBody: Between stacks of cookbooks and ad-filled recipe pages, the hardest part of cooking is finding the actual recipe. Recipe Slate turns any recipe link—or a photo of a cookbook page—into a clean, cookable format.
introBullet2: Snap or upload a cookbook photo
introBullet3: Get Ingredients, Steps, and a Shopping List—without the noise
urlPaywalled: This URL doesn't work because the site is paywalled or subscription-only. We can't import recipes from it. Try a different recipe URL.
urlNoRecipeData: No recipe data found at this URL. The site may not include structured recipe data, or we couldn't read it.
urlImportFailed: Something went wrong importing this recipe. Try again or use a different URL.
reparseTextHint: Edit the text below if OCR made mistakes, then Re-parse or use Fix with AI.
reparseTextPlaceholder: Paste or edit the recipe text…
